# The Aesthetic Brief — 2026-07-22

11 new item(s) worth your 5 minutes, grouped by category, most relevant first.

## Clinical / Treatment Trends

### Lemme Faces New Class-Action Lawsuit Over GLP-1 Supplement Marketing Claims
*Global Cosmetics News · Global · ★★★★☆*

Kourtney Kardashian Barker's wellness brand, Lemme, has been named in a new class-action lawsuit alleging that it made misleading marketing claims about the weight-loss benefits of its GLP-1 dietary supplement.

[Read more](https://www.globalcosmeticsnews.com/lemme-faces-new-class-action-lawsuit-over-glp-1-supplement-marketing-claims/)
